cases.prompt: How should I word a skill's description so it reliably fires on the right tasks but stays quiet otherwise?
Review my existing SKILL.md against skill best practices — its metadata, body, and reference layering.
cases.note: reviewing a skill against the spec

cases.prompt: My plugin idea is still fuzzy — help me pin down scope, non-goals, and how we'll verify it before we build anything.
I have a pinned spec. Choose the components and draft the activation eval cases for this new plugin.
cases.note: turning a decided spec into a PluginSpec
clear negative — no skill should fire

cases.prompt: Help me write a great cover letter for a job application.
